name: Golubtsi (Ukrainian Cabbage Rolls with Millet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the stem from a head of cabbage and pour boiling water over it.
2. Separate the leaves and trim the veins.
3. Dice the onions and carrots fine (julienne works for carrots) and sauté until the onions start to brown.
4. Wash the millet well, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Strain and set aside.
5. Combine chopped salt pork, carrot/onion mixture, peppers, salt, and raw eggs with the millet.
6. Mix thoroughly using your hands.
7. Place portions of the mixture onto cabbage leaves and roll tightly, tucking in the ends.
8. As you finish rolling the cabbage rolls, place them into a Dutch oven.
9. Add the sour cream dressing to the pot, bring to a boil, strain, salt, and serve.
Sour Cream Dressing:
1. Brown the flour in butter.
2. Add tomato paste and sour cream with some broth from the millet.
